title: teclea alexandrae
intro: Teclea alexandrae, also known as the Alexandra teclea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Teclea alexandrae include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. Teclea alexandrae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and it is also used in traditional remedies in various parts of the world.
